display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Welcome to Wongo's
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Welcome to Wongo's.png}} {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Hive}}. == Options == {{Frame|Wongo's Bargain Bin}} {{TS|negative||Pay 100 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 1 random Common {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} * Player also receives 32 Wongo Points.
{{Frame|Wongo's Featured Item}} {{TS|negative||Pay 200 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain [Rare Relic].}} * This relic is randomly selected from the rare relics in the standard relic pool, and will be displayed by name in the event option. * Player also receives 8 Wongo Points.
{{Frame|Wongo's Mystery Box}} {{TS|negative||Pay 300 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Obtain 3 random Relics after 5 combats.}} * Player obtains {{R|Wongo's Mystery Ticket||2}}. * Player also receives 16 Wongo Points.
{{Frame|Leave}} {{TS|negative||[[Upgrade|Downgrade]] a random card.}} ===Wongo Points=== After any purchase, the player will receive Wongo Points based on which purchase they selected. Wongo Points persist between all of the player's runs on their profile (across all characters), and the event text will display how many total Wongo Points the player has after making a purchase, as well as how many more points are needed to reach 2000 total points. Once the player reaches 2000 total Wongo Points, they will receive the {{R|Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge||2}}, which does nothing. == Conditions == * Only appears if all players have at least 100 gold. == Dialogue ==
“Welcome to Wongo's. We have what you want at Wongtastic prices.” says the least enthusiastic clerk you have ever met. “Peruse our wares and enjoy your time at Wongo's,” they continue, without even looking up.
{{Frame|Wongo's Bargain Bin}}, {{Frame|Wongo's Featured Item}}, or {{Frame|Wongo's Mystery Box}}
“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [Point Total] Wongo Points. With just [Remaining Points] more points, you will receive our exclusive Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge. Have a Wongtastic day.”
* If you have not yet received a Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge:
You have no clue what they are talking about and vow to never return to a Wongo's.
* If you have previously received at least one Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge, instead:
You have already received [Number of Badges] of these worthless badges. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.
* If your purchase brings your point total to 2000, instead:
“We are Wongo-wow'd by your generosity... Wonderful patron, you now have [Point Total] Wongo Points. Your points have earned you a Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge.” The clerk hands you a cheaply made badge. “Have a Wongtastic day.” You have now received [Number of Badges] badges. You vow to never return to a Wongo's.
{{Frame|Leave}}
“Um... excuse me you can't just leave without buying something at Wongo's,” says the clerk with an irritated tone. You have a heated debate over customer choice and it leaves you mentally drained.
